title: Innovative Ad Copy
scenario: Create a 50-word ad copy for a new line of sustainable furniture that is both stylish and eco-friendly. The copy should highlight the product's unique features and be delivered in a playful tone.
constraints: Must be delivered in a playful tone

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated text is under 50 words and delivered in a playful tone.
Evaluate the uniqueness and creativity of the ad copy.
Assess if the tone of the copy is playful and engaging.
